title: GMS Week 38 - PLATES PLUNGE!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 27/09/2022
Image reference: 2022-09-27_gms-week-38-plates-plunge_img1.jpg
While activity seemed as though it had been steadily increasing going into the final quarter of the year, the last couple of weeks have sent mixed signals as to whether the 4th quarter will actually be better for the ship recycling sector (as many have been anticipating). Couple of weeks ago, we saw currencies plummet in Pakistan and Bangladesh to the point, a wait-and-watch attitude encompassed both markets - at least until the first sale to a local Recycler establishes the new baseline for a type of unit in that market. This week, it was local steel plate prices across the sub-continent board that declined to varying degrees, subsequently adding even more pressure on a potential ship-recycling resurgence for Q4.
